code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = tokens.len()
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  mut first = true
  while i < n
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      if first
        out = "#{tok}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{tok}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 2
  end
  println(out)
end
